title: user-msg-replay-unification — C4 model
description: Component-level view of the SessionCompaction module surface affected by the helper extraction. Scope is limited to the opencode runtime container; external callers (TUI, web client) are unaffected.

systems.name: OpenCode runtime
systems.description: Single-process node/bun daemon hosting session runloop, compaction, provider integrations, and storage.

containers.name: Session runloop
containers.description: packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts. Owns deriveObservedCondition, calls SessionCompaction.run, hosts the now-deleted inline replay block.

containers.name: SessionCompaction module
containers.description: packages/opencode/src/session/compaction.ts. Owns kind chain, anchor write, telemetry, and the new replayUnansweredUserMessage helper.

containers.name: Session storage
containers.description: Storage router + SQLite + legacy fs backends. Read/write messages and parts.

containers.name: Event Bus
containers.description: In-process Bus.publish + GlobalBus EventEmitter. Telemetry channel and recentEvents projection driver.

components.name: runLoop
components.description: Per-iteration loop reading filterCompacted output. Calls SessionCompaction.run on observed conditions. Today: hosts inline replay block at lines 1484-1554; post-fix: this block is deleted.

components.name: Provider-switch pre-loop
components.description: Lines 1099-1146. Calls compactWithSharedContext directly (bypasses SessionCompaction.run because tool-call format incompatibility prevents kind-chain reuse). Post-fix: invokes the new helper after compactWithSharedContext returns.

components.name: Rebind pre-emptive
components.description: Lines 2104-2130. Calls SessionCompaction.run({observed:'rebind'}) when handed off a bloated session at WS open. Triggered the 2026-05-09 production swallow incident.

components.name: State-driven overflow
components.description: Lines 2387-2412. Calls SessionCompaction.run with observed derived from deriveObservedCondition (overflow / cache-aware / etc).

components.name: SessionCompaction.run
components.description: Lines 1700-1859. Single entry point for state-driven compaction. Walks kind chain, calls _writeAnchor + injectContinueAfterAnchor. Post-fix: invokes the new helper inside _writeAnchor.

components.name: compactWithSharedContext
components.description: Lines 512-680. Legacy single-step anchor write (snapshot text + compaction part type). Used by _writeAnchor and by provider-switch pre-loop directly. Post-fix: gains optional `observed` parameter for telemetry.

components.name: defaultWriteAnchor
components.description: Lines 1911-1948. Sanitizes summary, calls compactWithSharedContext, annotates anchor with skill snapshot. Post-fix: snapshots unanswered user msg before anchor write, calls the new helper after.

components.name: tryLlmAgent
components.description: LLM-agent kind-5 compaction; writes its own anchor inline (anchorWritten:true). Post-fix: invokes the new helper after its inline write.

components.name: injectContinueAfterAnchor
components.description: Lines 1867-1893. Currently appends synthetic Continue when INJECT_CONTINUE[observed] is true. Post-fix: rewrites to runtime stream check (skip if user msg already exists).

components.name: replayUnansweredUserMessage (NEW)
components.description: New export. Snapshot user msg → run anchor write → if buried, rewrite with fresh ULID, copy parts, delete originals. Idempotent under retry. Throws nothing; logs all branches; emits telemetry.

components.name: snapshotUnansweredUserMessage (NEW)
components.description: Local helper. Walks stream backward, finds most-recent user msg with no completed-finish assistant child. Returns {info, parts, emptyAssistantID?} or undefined.

components.name: publishCompactedAndResetChain
components.description: Lines 171-201. Bus.publish(Event.Compacted) + invalidateContinuationFamily + appendRecentEvent. Two callers (line 599, 2761) currently pass no eventMeta → recentEvents records observed:'unknown'. Post-fix: both pass eventMeta.

components.name: Messages + parts (SQLite)
components.description: ORDER BY id DESC stream (sqlite.ts:349). filterCompacted slices at first compaction part.

components.name: recentEvents ring buffer
components.description: Per-session execution.recentEvents (length-bounded). Surfaces in bus.session.updated. Used by Q card for compaction history visualization.

relationships.description: calls with observed:'rebind' when tokenRatio > 0.65 OR itemCount > 200
after successful anchor write, when stream lacks user msg post-anchor (post-fix runtime decision)
publishes Compacted (post-fix: passes observed via new arg)
writes summary-true assistant message + compaction part
writes new user msg + parts; removes originals
appends compaction event with observed/kind metadata (post-fix: never 'unknown' from prod sites)
